away.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Brionna Jones
players.injury_comment: Jones was spotted getting some shots up after Thursday's morning shootaround. She's reportedly making good progress, but a timetable has yet to be established. The Dream are planning to be "very smart" with her return, Copeland adds.

players.name: Amy Okonkwo
players.injury_comment: Okonkwo will sit out Tuesday's contest in order to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next chance to play will come Thursday against the Liberty.

injuries.name: Amy Okonkwo
injuries.comment: Okonkwo will sit out Tuesday's contest in order to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next chance to play will come Thursday against the Liberty.

injuries.name: Brionna Jones
injuries.comment: Jones was spotted getting some shots up after Thursday's morning shootaround. She's reportedly making good progress, but a timetable has yet to be established. The Dream are planning to be "very smart" with her return, Copeland adds.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: DiJonai Carrington
players.injury_comment: Carrington underwent left foot surgery in April and there's been no indication that she's close to making her season debut.

players.name: Aicha Coulibaly
players.injury_comment: Coulibaly will be held out of Tuesday's matchup in an effort to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next opportunity to play will come Thursday in Indiana.

players.name: Rickea Jackson
players.injury_comment: The season-ending knee injury is a devastating development for Jackson and the Sky, as the 25-year-old forward was well on her way to a career-best campaign. Through Chicago's first four games, Jackson averaged 18.0 points, 4.8 rebounds, 2.0 assists, 1.8 blocks and 1.5 three-pointers in 29.5 minutes per contest. After Jackson's early exit in Sunday's contest, Aicha Coulibaly opened the second half with the starters and looks to be the most likely candidate to move into the top unit for the Sky's next game Wednesday versus the Wings.

players.name: Courtney Vandersloot
players.injury_comment: Vandersloot is still recovering from the right knee surgery she underwent last June to repair a torn ACL, and there's been no indication that she's close to a return.

players.name: Maddy Westbeld
players.injury_comment: Westbeld is still waiting to make her first appearance of the season while signed to a developmental pact. She's now been eventually ruled out prior to all 12 of Chicago's contests so far.

injuries.name: Aicha Coulibaly
injuries.comment: Coulibaly will be held out of Tuesday's matchup in an effort to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next opportunity to play will come Thursday in Indiana.
